title: XPeng Turns Profitable in Q2 but Faces Tough Competition Against Tesla
text: XPeng achieved a historic milestone in Q2 2025 by turning profitable on a GAAP basis for the first time. The company's gross margin reached 17.3%, exceeding Tesla's Q2 2025 margin of 17.2%, a significant achievement for the Chinese EV maker. However, XPeng faces intense competitive pressure from Tesla and other EV manufacturers in both the Chinese domestic market and international markets. The company reported net loss of RMB 480 million in Q2 2025, narrowing 62.8% compared with the RMB 1.28 billion loss in Q2 2024. While profitability is approaching, the company must balance margin expansion with maintaining market share in a highly competitive environment. The Volkswagen partnership and AI technology initiatives position XPeng for potential competitive advantages, but execution risks remain.
